content.text:
[cron:ghl-pipeline-health-daily ghl-pipeline-health] GHL PIPELINE HEALTH CHECK: Query GHL opportunities API. Report: 1) Stale opportunities (no activity 3+ days) with contact name, stage, days stale. 2) Contacts with no recent communication (7+ days). 3) Appointments today/tomorrow with missing briefings. 4) Revenue pipeline summary by stage. 5) Hot leads (score 90+) requiring immediate follow-up. Format as Telegram-friendly report with emoji indicators.
Current time: Sunday, March 15th, 2026 — 08:38 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-15 13:38 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command: $h=@{Authorization="Bearer $env:GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN_TJB";Version='2021-07-28';Accept='application/json'};$base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com';$loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn';$urls=@('/opportunities?locationId='+$loc,'/opportunities/?locationId='+$loc,'/opportunities/search?location_id='+$loc,'/opportunities/search?locationId='+$loc,'/pipelines/opportunities?locationId='+$loc,'/opportunities/search');foreach($u in $urls){try{$r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ($base+$u) -Headers $h -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30;"$u -> $($r.StatusCode) len=$($r.Content.Length)"}catch{$resp=$_.Exception.Response;if($resp){"$u -> $([int]$resp.StatusCode)"}else{"$u -> ERR $($_.Exception.Message)"}}}
